steps.name: Close PDF guide upsell if it is displayed
Close notification prompt if it is displayed
Close Connect Email prompt if it is displayed
Close Connect Email prompt if it is displayed
Try to open Daily Plan customization actions for the first Daily Practice card
Close core exercise restriction popup if it appears
